description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named mariadb that can be called by other workflows. Set up a matrix build job on ubuntu-latest with various build configurations, including different compilers, renewal options, client types, HTTP libraries, sanitizers, packet versions, and MySQL versions. For each build configuration, run a series of steps in a Debian unstable container with a MariaDB service, including checking out the code, installing packages, initializing a database, getting plugins, building, testing, and running extra tests.
